# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of `coding-typing-tutor` is supported for security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| latest  | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/IFAKA/coding-typing-tutor/issues) if it's not sensitive. For sensitive vulnerabilities, please contact the maintainer directly through their GitHub profile.
